meta.title: CoreIntent | Mīhini Hokohoko Atamai — Kāore he Ohaurunga, Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te mīhini hokohoko. Kore ohaurunga. Ka whakahaerehia e CoreIntent a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae kore utu — māngai rorohiko pai. Hangaia ki Aotearoa e Zynthio.

hero.badge: ĀHUA WHAKAMATAU — KĀORE HE MONI TŪTURU I TE TŪRARU
hero.tagline: E Toru ngā Tauira AI. Kotahi te Mīhini.
hero.subtitle: Kore Ohaurunga.
hero.description: Ka kite a Grok. Ka tātari a Claude. Ka whakamana a Perplexity. Ka whakaae rātou, ka whiwhi tohu koe. Ka kore, ka tiakina koe. Whakataetae kore utu — māngai rorohiko pai.

hero_phrases: E Toru ngā Tauira AI e Tautohe ana.
Ka Kite a Grok. Ka Pātai a Claude.
Kotahi te Tauira e Matapae ana. E Toru e Tautohe ana.
$45/marama e Whakahaere ana i te Mīhini Katoa.
Tō Māngai. Tā Rātou Māngai. Ko te Pai Rawa ka Toa.
Kounga Tohu, Kaua ko te Rahinga.
Kore VC. Kore Whakaaetanga. Kore Mutunga.
Ehara tō Kaha i tō Pūkoro.
He Tāke ngā Ohaurunga. Kua Puta Mātou.
Kāore te Papa Toa e Aro Ki Te Kaihanga.
E Toru ngā Tātari. Kotahi te Tohu. Kore Matapae Noa.

how_it_works.label: Me Pēhea te Mahi
how_it_works.title: E Toru ngā Hipanga ki ngā Tohu Māramatanga

steps.title: Ka Tautohe ngā Tauira
steps.desc: Ka kite a Grok i tētahi tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakamana a Perplexity ki ngā raraunga ora. E toru ngā tirohanga, kotahi te kōrero.

steps.title: Ka Puta te Whakaae
steps.desc: Ka whakaae ngā tauira e toru, ka teitei te whakapono. Ka tautohetohe, ka tohua te āhei kore — kore teka whakapono.

steps.title: Ka Whakataetae Koe
steps.desc: Kawea te tohu ki ngā whakataetae ā-rā, ā-wiki, ā-marama rānei. Whakaaturia tō rautaki ki ētahi atu tāngata me māngai rorohiko. Kore utu te urunga.

mini_terminal.talk_to_engine: Kōrero ki te mīhini. Patohia he tono.

grok.role: Kitea tere tohu me te wairua

claude.role: Tātaritanga hōhonu me te aromatawai tūraru

perplexity.role: Rangahau me ngā pūrongo ā-wā tūturu

footer.copyright: © {year} Corey McIvor. Ngā mōtika katoa kua rahuitia.
footer.risk_warning: He tūraru nui te hokohoko moni matihiko. Kāore te whakatutukitanga o mua e whakapūmau ana i ngā hua ā muri. Āhua whakamatau hokohoko.

terminal.welcome: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — Mīhini Hokohoko CoreIntent
terminal.paper_mode: Āhua whakamatau hokohoko — kāore he moni tūturu i te tūraru
terminal.help_hint: Patohia help mō ngā tono. Tab ki te whakakī aunoa. cai ki te tīmata.
